meaning: n.[纺]细斜纹布(比三页细斜纹布更细),三页斜纹呢
examples: Jeanette rarely misses a football game.
Christopher: Oh, there's Jeanette. She's our goalie.
He also adored Jamaica Kincaid and Jeanette Winterson.
Award-winning author Jeanette Winterson has called for the UK's library network to be expanded.
Funnell, Jeanette Brakewell on Over To You, Leslie Law on Shear L'Eau and William Fox-Pitt on Moon Man.
